name: Acceptance of hidden works (АОСР)
description: A contractor reports a covering operation (e.g. rebar before concreting). Construction control (стройконтроль) must inspect and sign an Act of Inspection of Hidden Works (АОСР) BEFORE the work is covered — otherwise the covered work must be opened up. The gate's value is the temporal lock: an act signed after covering is worthless, and the event timestamps expose any cover that happened before the act.

evidence.description: Паспорт/сертификат на арматуру — material certificate for the rebar/concrete.
Протокол лабораторных испытаний — lab test protocol, if applicable.

checks.description: The as-built scheme and the material passport are attached.
The readiness date must be recorded; the inspection happens before covering and a decision after cover invalidates the act.

consequences.description: The signed АОСР is the right to cover the work and proceed to the pour.
